name: Ramp Ravioli with One-Hour Calamari
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the grill.
2. Place ramps on the grill and cook until tender and smoky, about 1 minute.
3. Remove ramps from the grill and allow to cool. Chop the cool ramps into 1/4-inch pieces and place in a small mixing bowl with black pepper and chopped tomatoes. Season with salt and set aside.
4. Bring 6 quarts of water to boil and add 2 tablespoons of salt.
5. Roll pasta to thinnest setting and cut into 3-inch squares. Place 1 tablespoon of ramp mixture in the center of each square and fold into a triangle. Continue until all pasta is done. Place ravioli in boiling water and simmer until cooked, about 4 to 5 minutes.
6. Meanwhile, heat calamari and olive oil in a 12 to 14-inch saute pan until boiling. Lower heat to simmer and add chives. Drain ravioli and toss into the pan with calamari. Toss gently to coat and mix. Pour into a warm platter and serve immediately.
Yield: 4 servings
